---
title: "Scripture Readings for Schools and Families. With comments by Charlotte M. Yonge. 5 vols"
---

## Scripture Readings for Schools and Families. With comments by Charlotte M. Yonge. 5 vols

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1871-1879
**Genre:** Non-fiction: theology (bible selections)
**Format:** Edited book

**Publisher:** London and New York: Macmillan and Co

### Notes

Two versions were available: the teacher\'s with comments at  3<i>s.</i> 6<i>d.</i> and a cheaper one for the pupils without comments at 1<i>s.</i> 6<i>d.</i>.  In the former the \'Reading\' consists of about a page in small type;  the \'Comment\' slightly more in larger type.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
